zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne於1011年8月23日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯時，他的父親Robert II le Pieux roi de France39歲，母親Constance d'Arles39歲。他於1033年與Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈洛勒斯哈洛勒斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1076年3月21日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯福勒-素爾-內享年64歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉-利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne于1011年8月23日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯时，他的父亲Robert II le Pieux roi de France39岁，母亲Constance d'Arles39岁。他于1033年与Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈洛勒斯哈洛勒斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1076年3月21日在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯福勒-素爾-內享年64岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉-利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne was born on 23 August 1011, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Robert II le Pieux roi de France, was 39 and his mother, Constance d'Arles, was 39. He married Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais in 1033, in Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 March 1076, in Fleury-sur-Orne, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in Saint-Seine-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne est né le 23 août 1011, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Robert II le Pieux roi de France, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Constance d'Arles, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais en 1033, à Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1076, à Fleury-sur-Orne, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Seine-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne am 23. August 1011 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert II le Pieux roi de France 39 und seine Mutter Constance d'Arles 39. Er hat 1033 in Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. März 1076 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Fleury-sur-Orne, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Seine-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne è nato il il 23 agosto 1011 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Robert II le Pieux roi de France, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Constance d'Arles, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais nel 1033, nel Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 marzo 1076, nel Fleury-sur-Orne, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Seine-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ier duc de Bourgogneが1011年8月23日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで生まれた時，父Robert II le Pieux roi de Franceは39歳，母Constance d'Arlesは39歳であった。1033年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャーオレスチャーオレスでHélie de Semur-en-Brionnaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1076年3月21日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスフレウリ-スル-オルンで64歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルサイント-セアイネ-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de L: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 비트리-오스-로그스
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne(이)가 1011년 8월 23일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II le Pieux roi de France(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance d'Arles(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1033년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 처레스 처레스에서 Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1076년 3월 21일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 플레우리-수-른에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 세인트-세이인-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.23 August 1011–21 March 1076: 23 de agosto de 1011–21 de março de 1076
pt.Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de L: Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne nasceu em 23 de agosto de 1011, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert II le Pieux roi de France, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Constance d'Arles, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais em 1033, em Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1076, em Fleury-sur-Orne, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Seine-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de L: витри-аукс-логесь, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne родился 23 августа 1011 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert II le Pieux roi de France было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance d'Arles, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais в 1033 г. в местности чароллесь, чароллесь, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 марта 1076 г. в местности флеури-сур-орн, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-сине-л'аббеи, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.23 August 1011–21 March 1076: 23 de agosto de 1011–21 de marzo de 1076
es.Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de L: Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne nació el 23 de agosto de 1011, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert II le Pieux roi de France, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Constance d'Arles, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais en 1033, en Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1076, en Fleury-sur-Orne, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Seine-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
